note.zh: 在 Qoder 中由 Qwen3.8-Max-Preview 一次生成,本页为未经修改的原始产出。自命名「神话大陆」的体素世界(Minecraft 风格):区块地形、方块破坏/放置与第一人称探索。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Qwen3.8-Max-Preview inside Qoder; unmodified original output. A self-titled "神话大陆" (Mythic Land) voxel world (Minecraft-style): chunked terrain, block break/place, and first-person exploration.

note.zh: 在 Qoder 中由 Qwen3.8-Max-Preview 一次生成,本页为未经修改的原始 SVG。海边骑行的鹈鹕场景。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Qwen3.8-Max-Preview inside Qoder; unmodified original SVG. A pelican cycling by the seaside.

note.zh: 在 Qoder 中由 Qwen3.8-Max-Preview 一次生成,本页为未经修改的原始产出。基于 Three.js 的镂空机械表,可交互旋转查看机芯结构。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Qwen3.8-Max-Preview inside Qoder; unmodified original output. A Three.js skeleton mechanical watch with interactive rotation to inspect the movement.

note.zh: 在 Qoder 中由 Qwen3.8-Max-Preview 一次生成的完整 Vite + React 18 + Three.js 工程,未经修改;本页为其构建产物(部署时由源码打包为单文件)。与其他条目同一道 cs-dust2 题、不同模型。
note.en: A complete Vite + React 18 + Three.js project generated in one shot by Qwen3.8-Max-Preview inside Qoder, unmodified; this page is its build output (bundled from source into a single file at deploy time). Same cs-dust2 case as the other entries, a different model.

note.zh: Qwen3.8-Max-Preview(Qoder · Default)用仓库标准中文提示词一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「圈地兽」。诊断:API 合规,两个种子均负(364:901、403:892,圈地约 14/37 格),扩张偏弱但比同厂 Qwen3.7-Max 有起色(后者两局均 0 圈地)。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by Qwen3.8-Max-Preview (Qoder, Default) from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt, no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "圈地兽" (Land-grab Beast). Diagnosis: API-compliant, loses both seeds (364:901, 403:892; ~14/37 captures) — weak expansion but a step up from stablemate Qwen3.7-Max, which captured nothing on either seed.
